outreach.notes: Runs Expo-2027-focused business events (construction conference under the German Market Development Program; CEBAC Conference: EXPO 2027 with 13 European chambers). Gatekeeper to German SMEs eyeing Expo work. CAVEAT: email was published on the CEBAC event page which now 404s (checked 2026-07-06) — standard AHK membership contact, treat as unverified-current.
